subcodes.title: Words to the resident friends, spoken on 1914-04-29
subcodes.first_line: This is a blessed day, a happy and joyful day. The beauty, the holiness and the significance of these days of Rizvan are not known now.
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @power of the Manifestation of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
